## Summary

- Behavior changed:
- Target hardware or host-only scope:
- SDK, CMake, or configuration impact:

## Validation

- [ ] `./tools/check-repo.sh`
- [ ] `./tools/host-tests.sh` when library behavior changed
- [ ] `tools/clangd-compile-commands.py --validate-arc-headers` when public headers or component deps changed
- [ ] Relevant `idf.py build` target or reason firmware build was intentionally skipped

## Release Evidence

- Runtime logs, benchmark output, HIL artifact, or reason not applicable:
- Security, safety-case, licensing, or documentation impact:
- Follow-up work intentionally left out:
